scripts.dev: node scripts/electron-ensure.mjs && concurrently "pnpm run dev:vite" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:mock: node scripts/electron-ensure.mjs && VITE_MOCK=true XYZ_MOCK=1 concurrently "pnpm run dev:vite" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:preload && electron . --remote-debugging-port=9222
scripts.build: pnpm run build:runtime && pnpm run build:vite && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:preload && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter @xyz-agent/frontend run test && pnpm --filter @xyz-agent/runtime run test && cd main && vitest run
